overall.description: A first-person walkthrough of a coastal resort in GTA V, beginning on a sandy beach beside a Mediterranean-style building with international flags, ascending concrete stairs to an elevated pool deck featuring an infinity pool, circular hot tub, and pool bar, all under gray overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach below coastal resort building

events.description: begin ascending concrete stairs from beach level to upper pool deck

agents.ego_description: walking along the sandy beach beside a large Mediterranean-style resort building, approaching and climbing the concrete stairs to the upper deck

entered.detail: large white Mediterranean-style building with red tile roof and multiple international flags on poles
sandy beach with patches of dune grass and vegetation
white concrete retaining wall with black metal railings separating beach from upper deck
wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading from beach to pool deck
tall palm trees visible behind the resort building against misty mountains

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sandy beach with a large Mediterranean-style resort building on the left. The camera walks forward along the sand, passing dune vegetation, with the ocean visible ahead. The concrete retaining wall and stairs of the upper deck dominate the right side as the camera approaches and begins ascending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: resort pool deck with infinity pool and hot tub

events.description: emerging from stairs onto the pool deck, revealing the swimming pool, hot tub, and ocean view
character briefly raises hands to face, possibly wiping water or adjusting eyewear

agents.ego_description: walking around the pool deck, circling the hot tub and pool area, observing the resort amenities and ocean view

entered.detail: large infinity-edge swimming pool with clear turquoise water extending toward the ocean
circular hot tub with red brick tile border and actively bubbling water
wet gray concrete tile flooring with puddles reflecting the overcast sky
covered outdoor bar with red and yellow trim and stools
small arched metal bridge with railings crossing over a section of the pool
white plastic lounge chairs arranged in rows around the pool
blue and white striped umbrellas over the lounge chairs
flagpoles with US, UK, Scottish, and other national flags waving above the building

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto the pool deck, the scene reveals a luxurious resort area with an infinity pool, circular hot tub, and pool bar. The camera walks around the deck, passing lounge chairs and umbrellas, with the main resort building visible in the background. The deck tiles are wet, suggesting recent rain, and the ocean is visible beyond the infinity pool edge. A brief moment shows the character's hands raised to their face.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sandy shoreline up into a luxurious, elevated resort area. It begins on a beach, walking forward past dune vegetation with a Mediterranean-style building to the left and the ocean ahead. As the camera approaches the right side of the frame, it ascends a set of concrete stairs that lead away from the sand. The scene then opens onto a wet pool deck, where the camera glides past lounge chairs and umbrellas toward an infinity pool, a circular hot tub, and a pool bar. Finally, the view expands to show the main resort building in the background and the ocean stretching beyond the pool's edge, briefly capturing the character's hands raised to their face.
